hook.summary: UGC creator excitedly introduces the game's Hogwarts orientation and character creation.
hook.visual_action: A woman holds a phone displaying the character customization screen while speaking to the camera.
hook.text_overlay: Oooh! Hogwarts orientation! Check this out!
hook.voiceover_transcript: Oooh, Hogwarts orientation! Check this out!

scene_flow: UGC creator introduces the game and character customization.
Close-up of character creation UI showing hair and eye options.
Transition to the 'Choose Your House' screen selecting Ravenclaw.
Display of the 'Choose Your Wand' screen with specific wand stats.
Final gameplay montage of match-3 puzzles with a 'Play Now' CTA.
on_screen_text: TAP ON A HOUSE CREST TO LEARN MORE
TAP ON A WAND TO LEARN MORE
audience_proxy: Harry Potter fans and casual puzzle gamers who enjoy personalization and fantasy themes.
